why_this_action.summary: Verified whether the live Apollo curator follow-up list is actually usable, so the loop stops treating stale zero-record evidence as truth.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
curator_outreach_queue_latest.json: existing curator follow-up contacts already exist
apollo_status.json: Apollo login is healthy and available for execution
marketing_2026-05-22_apollo_curator_followup_list.json: prior list creation evidence needed a second-pass count check

evidence: Apollo UI shows list 'Ralph Workflow — curator follow-up 2026-05-22' with 5 visible records.
The curator follow-up asset is now usable for sequence launch with a Codeberg-primary CTA.
